title: UiPath (PATH) Earnings Dates, Call Summary & Reports - TipRanks.com
text: TipRanks provides comprehensive earnings tracking and analysis for UiPath (PATH). Platform aggregates analyst ratings, price targets, and earnings call summaries. UiPath earnings calendar shows quarterly reporting dates with analyst expectations and consensus estimates. Recent earnings calls highlight management commentary on agentic automation momentum and customer adoption trends. Analyst coverage shows mixed sentiment with some bullish outlooks on AI transformation opportunity and others cautious on valuation and macro headwinds. Price target distribution shows range from $12.00 to $19.00, with consensus around $14-15 range. Analyst ratings breakdown: 12 Hold, 2 Buy, 1 Sell. Recent earnings call transcripts detail discussions on customer wins, product launches, and financial guidance. Management emphasized acceleration in agentic AI adoption with growing number of customers moving from pilots to production deployments. TipRanks sentiment analysis tracks investor reaction to earnings announcements and estimates changes.
